page.title: Skills
page.tagline: Instructions any agent in this workspace can use.

used.label: In use
used.description: Skills assigned to at least one agent

unused.label: Unused
unused.description: Skills not assigned to any agent

empty.title: No skills yet
empty.description: Create your first skill, import one from a URL, or copy one from a connected runtime — and every agent in the workspace can use it.

intro_banner.title: Shared with your workspace.
intro_banner.body: Anyone can create a skill, import one from a URL, or copy one from their local runtime — and every agent can use it.
intro_banner.highlight: Local runtime skills stay private until you copy one here.

list_error.title: Couldn't load skills
list_error.fallback: Something went wrong fetching the skill list.

page.supporting_data_warning: Some workspace data failed to load. Creator attribution, runtime names, or edit permissions may appear incomplete.

table.name: Name
table.lock_tooltip: Read-only — only creator or admin can edit

actions.delete_no_permission: Selection includes skills only their creator or an admin can delete
actions.delete_dialog_desc_one: This will permanently delete the selected skill and remove it from all agents.
actions.delete_dialog_desc_other: This will permanently delete the {{count}} selected skills and remove them from all agents.
actions.add_dialog_description: Select the agents that should get the selected skills.

detail.supporting_data_warning: Some workspace data failed to load. Creator attribution, runtime names, or edit permissions may appear incomplete until the next refresh.
detail.description_placeholder: One sentence describing when an agent should use this skill…

conflict_banner.title: Someone else updated this skill
conflict_banner.body: Your edits are preserved. Discard to pull their changes, or Save to overwrite.

save_bar.unsaved: Unsaved changes — will overwrite the live skill on save

sidebar.permissions_owner: You can edit and delete this skill. Changes take effect on the next agent run.
sidebar.permissions_locked_creator: Only the creator ({{name}}) or a workspace admin can edit this skill.
sidebar.permissions_locked: Only the creator or a workspace admin can edit this skill.
sidebar.used_by_empty: Not assigned to any agent yet. Open an agent's Skills tab to assign.

not_found.title: Skill not found
not_found.fallback: This skill may have been deleted or you lost access.

delete_dialog.title: Delete skill?
delete_dialog.description_with_agents_one: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and remove it from {{count}} agent currently using it.
delete_dialog.description_with_agents_other: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and remove it from {{count}} agents currently using it.
delete_dialog.description_no_agents: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and remove it from all agents.

errors.reserved: SKILL.md is reserved for the main file.
errors.exists: A file at this path already exists.

chooser.title: New skill
chooser.desc: Choose how you want to add a skill to this workspace.

manual.title: Create manually
manual.desc: Write a new SKILL.md from scratch.

url.title: Import from URL
url.desc: Fetch a published skill by URL. Files are pulled server-side.

runtime.title: Copy from runtime
runtime.desc: Scan a local runtime and promote one of its on-disk skills into this workspace.

method_card.manual_desc: Start from a blank SKILL.md and write your own instructions.
method_card.url_desc: Pull a published skill from ClawHub or Skills.sh.
method_card.runtime_desc: Promote a skill already installed on your local runtime.

manual.name_hint: Must be unique within the workspace.
manual.description_placeholder: One sentence on when to assign this skill to an agent.
manual.name_conflict_hint: Try a different name and submit again.

url.name_conflict_hint: The imported skill's name already exists — delete the existing one before retrying.

runtime_import.no_local_runtimes_hint: Connect a local runtime to browse and import its local skills.
runtime_import.must_be_online: Runtime must be online to browse local skills.
runtime_import.load_failed: Failed to load runtime local skills
runtime_import.not_supported: This runtime provider does not expose local skill inventory yet.
runtime_import.no_skills_hint: This runtime does not have any discoverable local skills yet.
runtime_import.ignored_files_hint: Symlinks, unreadable files, oversized files, and very large bundles are ignored during import.
runtime_import.skill_description_placeholder: Optional — describe when an agent should use this skill.
runtime_import.conflict_single_title: A skill with this name already exists
runtime_import.conflict_hint: Choose whether to overwrite the existing workspace skill, import with a new name, or skip it.
runtime_import.conflict_locked_creator: This skill was created by {{creator}}. Only the creator can overwrite it from local import; edit it from the Skill detail page if you need to change it.
runtime_import.conflict_locked: Only the creator can overwrite this skill from local import; edit it from the Skill detail page if you need to change it.
runtime_import.conflict_missing_resolution: Choose how to resolve this conflict.
runtime_import.conflict_name_still_exists: That name already exists. Choose another name or skip.
